articles.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
articles.description: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

articles.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
articles.description: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

articles.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
articles.description: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

articles.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
articles.description: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms and is working on integration.

articles.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
articles.description: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

articles.title: Apple brings back card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year hiatus
articles.description: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapting to the country's payments framework.

articles.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
articles.description: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

articles.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
articles.description: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

articles.title: Canadian spy agency says it hacked drug traffickers, extremists, and a ransomware gang last year
articles.description: The hacking operations disclosed in a Canadian spy agency's annual report underscores some pressing national security threats facing the country and its top allies.

articles.title: How to reserve and change your WhatsApp username
articles.description: WhatsApp now lets users reserve usernames ahead of the feature’s full rollout, making it possible to connect without sharing a phone number once usernames go live.

articles.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups

articles.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent

articles.title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
articles.description: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.

articles.title: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump
articles.description: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.

articles.title: Trump memecoin investors lost $3.8 billion, analysis finds
articles.description: Nearly 1 million people have lost a total of $3.8 billion after buying President Donald Trump’s $TRUMP memecoin, while Trump made $636 million.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI与模型发展**：Vercel CEO呼吁将AI模型与智能体分离；Reddit正用大语言模型解决由其自身引发的问题；Google用户数据被用于训练AI，现可选择退出。
2. **科技裁员潮**：2026年多家科技公司裁员与AI相关；微软在Xbox及商业销售部门裁员近5000人。
3. **设备与应用更新**：iOS 27测试版允许自定义Siri语速与表现力；WhatsApp即将支持用户名功能；Bookshop.org确认今年将支持Kobo电子阅读器。
4. **企业融资与市场动态**：智能眼镜制造商Even Realities获美团、腾讯投资1.5亿美元，估值达10亿美元；一家人形机器人公司计划上市，但CEO称短期内不会进入家庭；Uber在欧洲扩张遇阻。
5. **其他重要新闻**：加拿大间谍机构去年成功入侵贩毒集团、极端组织及勒索软件团伙；苹果在印度恢复Apple账户银行卡支付；特朗普相关迷因币投资者损失达38亿美元。

今日最值得关注的发展是：AI技术正深刻影响从个人设备到企业战略的方方面面，同时引发就业市场与数据隐私的新挑战。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **Hugging Face多项更新**：发布第四部分数据战略、推出Kernels重大更新、与Cerebras合作将Gemma 4应用于实时语音AI，并在模型页面集成所有评估结果（ScarfBench等），强调AI专业化的必然趋势。
2. **Google AI聚焦教育与生产力**：纽约教育者与行业领袖共商AI课堂应用，并发布“解锁英国生产力新时代”计划，旨在培养AI先锋人才。
3. **OpenAI披露ChatGPT采用扩展与GeneBench-Pro**：介绍ChatGPT用户增长情况，推出基因基准测试GeneBench-Pro，并修复了一项持续18年的核心转储流行病学bug。
4. **中国AI创新突破**：中国公司在联合国提出“类脑”方案为AI减负，不依赖算力堆砌；阿里与清华合作的极简扩散模型方案获ICML杰出论文奖，刷新推理纪录。

**最值得关注的发展**：Hugging Face与Cerebras合作将Gemma 4引入实时语音AI，标志着开源模型在低延迟、高交互场景中的关键突破，同时阿里清华的极简扩散模型获奖，凸显中国在AI效率优化领域的领先地位。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国科技与能源领域全球影响力提升**：法国电力公司高管呼吁欧盟学习中国能源技术；德国因技术转移问题暂停与Cispa网络安全总监的合作；中国在机器人（特别是人形机器人手部技术）、GPU芯片（壁仞科技融资9亿美元挑战英伟达）、自动驾驶（全球市场预计2040年达1万亿美元）及AI大模型（字节跳动发现新缩放定律，预计2027年出现类似“Mythos”模型）等领域取得显著进展。

2. **中国军事与航天发展受关注**：中国向太平洋无核区发射弹道导弹；外界持续关注中国是否已获得“世界上最重要的机器”（可能指高端芯片制造设备或量子计算机）。

3. **中美科技竞争加剧**：美国政策被指无意中加速了中国开放AI生态系统；中国学术领域出现“研究生辍学挑战学术明星”的现象；星巴克在华调整策略以应对咖啡市场变化。

4. **中国旅游与消费市场动态**：外国游客在中国自驾体验引发讨论；星巴克在培养中国咖啡消费习惯后，正加大消费者策略投入。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在AI、机器人、芯片及自动驾驶等关键技术领域加速突破，并引发全球产业与政策层面的连锁反应，同时军事与航天进展持续吸引国际目光。
